prd_items.description: Render expandable/collapsible stat blocks per monster and minion
steps: Add a stat block component that can be expanded or collapsed
Render the stat block on each monster row and each minion row
Populate the stat block with the monster's list of attacks and abilities
Write specs covering expand/collapse behavior and correct data rendering
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Style stat blocks in the visual language of Draw Steel book using official glyphs
steps: Import glyphs/icons from /home/kamo/Downloads/DrawSteelGlyphs
Match the layout and visual style of stat blocks as seen in the Draw Steel book
Use the glyphs inline within the stat block where appropriate (damage types, keywords, etc.)
Write specs verifying glyph rendering and visual layout structure
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Source stat block data from SteelCompendium bestiary repositories
steps: Integrate data from https://github.com/SteelCompendium/data-bestiary-md and/or https://github.com/SteelCompendium/data-bestiary-json
Use the steel-compendium-sdk npm package (https://www.npmjs.com/package/steel-compendium-sdk) for parsing
Ensure parsed data maps correctly to the stat block component's expected props
Write specs covering data fetching, parsing, and correct prop mapping
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Render HP, MARIP, and other core stats from monster JSON data
steps: Display the monster's default max stamina and current stamina
Display MARIP (Might, Agility, Reason, Intuition, Presence) values
Display any other relevant stats sourced from the monster's JSON data
Write specs verifying correct rendering of stamina, MARIP, and other stats from sample JSON
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Allow minions to be assigned a captain from among the encounter's monsters
steps: Add a 'Captain' pill under the 'Minion' header in the parent minion row
Clicking the Captain pill reveals a dropdown listing all other monsters in the encounter
Selecting a monster from the dropdown assigns it as the minion group's captain
The Captain pill then renders the captain's colored ordinal number and monster name
Write specs covering pill click, dropdown display, captain assignment, and rendered output
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Allow removing an assigned captain from a minion group
steps: Show an 'x' button next to the captain monster's name on the captain pill
Clicking the 'x' button unassigns the captain from the minion group
The Captain pill reverts to its unassigned state
Write specs covering captain removal and pill state reset
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Support marking individual child minions as dead or alive
steps: Add a dead/alive toggle (checkbox) on each child minion instead of an individual stamina counter
Reflect the dead/alive state visually on the child minion row
Write specs covering toggle behavior and visual state changes
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Render minion stamina as interval-based shared pool display
steps: Replace the standard stamina display for the parent minion with an interval layout (e.g. '5 / 10 / 15 / 20')
Calculate interval size based on the minion's stats from the bestiary data
Calculate the number of intervals based on how many minions are in the group
Make it visually clear at which stamina thresholds individual minions die
Write specs covering interval calculation, rendering, and threshold clarity
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Minion stamina popover with interval-based input
steps: Show a popover on hover over the minion stamina display
Provide the same add/remove stamina controls as other monsters
Replace the 'currentStam / maxStam' text input with a 'lastInterval / interval / ... / firstInterval' layout
Dynamically adjust the number of interval segments based on the number of minions
Write specs covering popover display, stamina controls, and dynamic interval segments
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Subtly inform the director when stamina drops past an interval threshold
steps: Detect when stamina crosses an interval boundary
Display a subtle visual cue informing the director that minions need to be killed or revived
Leave the actual dead/alive toggle to the director's manual action
Write specs covering threshold detection and visual cue display
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Defer malice stat block rendering until design is decided
steps: Do not render stat blocks for malice creatures
Leave a placeholder or skip malice entries in the stat block rendering logic
Write specs verifying malice creatures do not render stat blocks
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Add monsters to an existing group
steps: Provide a UI control on each group to add a new monster
Present a list of available monsters sourced from the JSON bestiary data
Insert the selected monster into the group
Write specs covering the add control, monster list population, and insertion into group state
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Create a new blank group
steps: Add a UI control to create a new empty encounter group
Initialize the group with default/empty state
Allow the user to then add monsters into the new group
Write specs covering group creation and initial empty state
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Delete a monster from a group
steps: Add a delete control on each monster within a group
Confirm or immediately remove the monster from the group
Handle cleanup of any references (e.g. captain assignments)
Write specs covering deletion, state cleanup, and reference handling
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Add protection for delete monster action
steps: Add a 'Are you sure?' confirmation alert to prevent accidental deletions
If the user confirms positively, then delete the monster, otherwise do nothing
Write specs
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Reorder encounter groups via drag and drop
steps: Make encounter group rows draggable
Allow dropping a group at a new position to reorder (e.g. initiative or table preference)
Persist the new order in state
Write specs covering drag initiation, drop reordering, and state persistence
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Reorder monsters within a group or move between groups via drag and drop
steps: Make individual monster rows draggable
Allow reordering within the same group
Allow dragging a monster into a different group
Persist the new order and group assignment in state
Write specs covering intra-group reorder, cross-group move, and state persistence
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Move conditions between monsters via drag and drop
steps: Make condition pills draggable
Allow dropping a condition pill onto another monster to transfer it
Remove the condition from the source monster and add it to the target
Write specs covering condition drag, drop transfer, and source/target state updates
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Animate EoT and SE condition indicators when a monster's turn is set to acted
steps: Detect when a monster's turn state changes to 'acted'
Apply a pulsate/glow animation to the EoT and SE condition pills
Keep the animation running until resolved or cancelled
Write specs covering animation trigger on turn state change and animation lifecycle
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Auto-disable EoT conditions after 30 seconds if not clicked
steps: Start a 30-second timer when a monster's turn is set to 'acted'
If the EoT condition is not clicked within 30 seconds, disable/deactivate it
If the EoT condition IS clicked within 30 seconds, it stays active (the click means 'keep this condition')
Write specs covering timer behavior, auto-disable, and click-to-keep interactions
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: SE conditions remain enabled by default after 30 seconds (assume save succeeded)
steps: After 30 seconds without interaction, SE conditions remain active (save assumed successful)
Clicking the SE condition is the only way to remove it (indicating the save failed)
Ensure the glow/pulsate animation stops after the 30-second window
Write specs covering default persistence, click-to-remove, and animation stop
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: No condition changes when resetting a group's turn state back to pending
steps: When a group's turn state is set back to 'pending', leave all conditions unchanged
Conditions remain in their current active/inactive state
Write specs verifying conditions are untouched after a pending reset
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Cancel condition animations if a group is immediately set back to pending after acting
steps: If a group is set to 'acted' and then immediately set back to 'pending', cancel the pulsate/glow animation
Leave all conditions unchanged and active
Cancel any running 30-second timers
Write specs covering rapid acted-to-pending transition, animation cancellation, and timer cleanup
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Keyboard access for all dropdowns
steps: Ensure dropdown options are reachable and activatable from the keyboard after opening
Implement focus trap and focus restore on open/close
Support arrow key navigation, Escape to close, and Enter/Space to select
Write specs covering focus trap, arrow key navigation, Escape, and Enter/Space behavior
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Persist encounter data in local storage
steps: Serialize the current encounter state to a format suitable for local storage
Save encounter state to local storage on every meaningful state change
Handle storage quota errors gracefully
Write specs covering serialization, storage writes, and error handling
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Reload local storage state on page load
steps: On app initialization, check local storage for saved encounter state
Deserialize and restore the encounter state if found
Fall back to default/empty state if no saved data exists or data is corrupt
Write specs covering state restoration, fallback behavior, and corrupt data handling
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Create new, empty encounters and name them
steps: Add a UI control to create a new encounter
Prompt the user to provide a name for the encounter
Initialize the encounter with empty state and store it
Write specs covering encounter creation, naming, and initial state
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass

prd_items.description: Switch between encounters
steps: Add a UI control to list and select from available encounters
Save the current encounter state before switching
Load the selected encounter's state and render it
Write specs covering encounter listing, save-before-switch, and state loading
Run the specs, fix any failures until all pass
